title: Settings

profile.title: Profile
profile.dataExportDescription: Export all your personal data in compliance with GDPR. Your export will be available for 7 days.
profile.bothDatesRequired: Please provide both start and end dates, or leave both empty.
profile.noExportsYet: No exports yet. Request your first export above.
profile.rightToBeForgottenDescription: Request deletion of all your personal data in compliance with GDPR. This action cannot be undone after the 30-day recovery period.
profile.deletionItem2: Anonymize your participation in other recordings
profile.deletionItem3: Delete all tasks, summaries, and chat conversations
profile.deletionRecoveryPeriod: You have 30 days to cancel this request after it's processed.
profile.deleteMyDataConfirmation: I understand that this action will permanently delete all my personal data and cannot be undone after the 30-day recovery period.
profile.recoveryPeriodDescription: Your data has been anonymized but can still be recovered for {count} more day{count, plural, one {} other {s}}. After this period, the deletion will be permanent.
profile.permanentDeletionDescription: The recovery period has ended. Your data has been permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile.privacyRightsDescription: Exercise your GDPR rights to restrict processing (Art. 18) or object to processing (Art. 21) of your personal data.
profile.privacyInfo: Right to Restriction (Art. 18) temporarily halts processing of your data while a dispute is resolved. Right to Object (Art. 21) allows you to object to processing based on legitimate interest. Requests are reviewed by our Data Protection Officer within 30 days.
profile.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why you are making this request...

cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.info: Inovy uses only essential cookies required for authentication and session management. No tracking or marketing cookies are used.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Manage your organization settings and members
organization.aiInstructionsDescription: Organization-wide guidelines for AI behavior across all projects
organization.clickEditToAdd: Click "Edit" to add instructions for your organization.
organization.instructionsPlaceholder: Enter organization-wide guidelines and instructions for the AI. These will be included in all chat responses across all projects to help guide AI behavior for your organization.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect and manage your third-party integrations
integrations.googleIntegrationDescription: Connect your Google account to enable calendar and email features
integrations.disconnectDescription: This will revoke Inovy's access to your Google account. Automatic calendar events and email drafts will be disabled. Your existing recordings and tasks will not be affected.
integrations.feature1: Automatically create calendar events from extracted tasks
integrations.feature2: Generate Gmail drafts from meeting summaries
integrations.feature3: Customize email templates and event details
integrations.driveSignIn: Please sign in to manage Drive folder monitoring.
integrations.driveDescription: Monitor Google Drive folders for automatic file processing. When audio or video files are uploaded to watched folders, they will be automatically processed and converted to recordings with AI insights.
integrations.editWatchDescription: Update the project for this watched folder
integrations.addWatchDescription: Enter a Google Drive folder ID to monitor for file uploads
integrations.folderIdHint: You can find the folder ID in the Google Drive URL. The folder ID is the long string of characters after
integrations.projectHint: Files uploaded to this folder will be linked to the selected project
integrations.addFolderHint: Add a folder to start monitoring for file uploads.
integrations.deleteWatchDescription: Are you sure you want to stop watching this folder? This will stop monitoring for new file uploads.

bot.title: Notetaker Settings
bot.description: Configure your notetaker assistant preferences and manage recording consent
bot.failedToLoad: Failed to load notetaker settings. Please try again.

agent.title: Knowledge Base Browser
agent.description: Browse and manage indexed documents in your knowledge base

overview.title: Settings
overview.allSet: You're all set — nothing needs your attention right now.
overview.connectGoogleDescription: Enable calendar sync, email integration, and Drive monitoring
overview.configureNotetakerDescription: Set up automatic meeting recording and transcription

deleteOrg.title: Delete Organization
deleteOrg.description: Permanently delete this organization and all its data. This action has a 7-day grace period during which you can cancel.
deleteOrg.scheduledMessage: This organization is scheduled for deletion on {date}.
deleteOrg.warningBanner: This organization is scheduled for deletion on {date}.
deleteOrg.warningItems: This will permanently delete all recordings, projects, meetings, tasks, documents, and member data.
